name: Midway USA's Rapid Fire
overview: History’s greatest weapons, from two different eras, battle it out for supremacy in the all-new MidwayUSA’s Rapid Fire! Hosted by Iain Harrison and Mike Seeklander , Rapid Fire will light up the night with 30 high-octane minutes that feature the best of automatic weaponry, military hardware, and the fascinating stories behind the world’s most popular rapid-firing weapons. Watch as history’s greatest weapons go head-to-head in MidwayUSA’s Rapid Fire!
